# Cohort spot-check checklist (RISK_REGISTER §18 mechanism)

Run by Founder (or designated monitor) on a sample of EACH cohort session,
within one week of delivery. Source = session recording or two-staff notes
(per voice-surface rule, §24). Log one row per check in the table below.

## Per-session checks
- [ ] Recording or two-staff notes exist for the session (§24 — if neither, that
      is itself a finding; the session should not have run).
- [ ] No buy/sell/hold/enter/exit guidance on any instrument, named or unnamed.
- [ ] No market-timing direction ("wait for the dip", "now's the time") — the
      §1 advice prong does not require tickers.
- [ ] "Should I trade X?" moments redirected to process ("your decision — let's
      look at your sizing/plan/journal"), not answered.
- [ ] No performance talk: no coach PnL bragging, no member-win showcasing
      without §17 Endorsement treatment.
- [ ] No tool/bot/token promotion; any mention was mechanics-only (§20).
- [ ] No solicitation or acceptance of personal payment/tips (§4 —
      coach-agreement violation, immediate role removal).
- [ ] Disclaimer stated or visible at session start.

## Outcome
- PASS → log it.
- FINDING → log it; coach gets the relevant rule quoted; repeat finding or any
  §4 (payment) finding → role removed per COACH_AGREEMENT §7.

## Log
| Date | Cohort / session | Coach | Sampled (rec/notes) | Result | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
